name: pi-statusline
description: Claude-style compact status line and single-line prompt editor for Pi.

settings.label: Enable statusline
settings.description: Enable compact statusline/editor chrome. Disable and reload to return to Pi defaults.

settings.label: Replace built-in footer
settings.description: Hide Pi default footer while the compact statusline is active.

settings.label: Use π prompt editor
settings.description: Replace the main editor with the compact π prompt editor.

settings.label: Input bottom padding
settings.description: Blank lines below the compact prompt. Default is 0 for no extra space.

settings.label: Git refresh timeout
settings.description: Timeout for each git metadata command.

settings.label: Show dirty marker
settings.description: Append * to the branch badge when the worktree is dirty.
